sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15443" key="a)rr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρρ-</orth>, in words beginning with <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ρ</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ρ</foreign> is doubled after a Prefix.</entryFree>
